videos.author: MTGGoldfish
videos.title: Nice Fetchlands You Have There... | Much Abrew
videos.description:
Opposition Agent was added to Timeless recently. Fetchlands will never be the same...

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/much-abrew-opposition-agent-is-coming-for-your-fetchlands-timeless
